content.en:
Ye Tian didn't think too much about it, and soon met with this phosphorus-free ancestor.

"I've seen the Phosphorus-Free Great Ancestor!"

Ye Tian said politely in the time and space of the Huanyu Alliance network.

The Phosphorus-Free Great Ancestor didn't despise Ye Tian just because it was only a fourth-stage high-level immeasurable lifeform, after all, he still wanted to trade a lot of ruin gold from Ye Tian, so he naturally had to be polite.

"I've seen the Endless Great Ancestor!" said the Phosphorus-Free Great Ancestor.

"Phosphorus-free Great Ancestor, you suddenly came to me, there should be something important, right?" Ye Tian didn't think that the Phosphorus-Free Great Ancestor came to chat with him, so he asked directly.

"There is indeed something important!" The Phosphorus-Free Great Ancestor said the purpose of his trip, "I heard that you have some gold in your hands, can you trade it to me?"

"Phosphorus-free Great Ancestor, do you want to ruin gold?"

Ye Tian was surprised.

He guessed that it was Jin Heng Ancestor who told him about his possession of the ruin, but he didn't care, after all, it wasn't an important secret.

"Yes, no matter how much gold there is, I want it!" said the Phosphorus-Free Great Ancestor.

"All of them?"

When Ye Tian heard this, he had a guess in his heart.

Obviously, the Phosphorus-Free Great Ancestor should have an immeasurable realm armor, which is why he is so eager for ruin gold.

A forged puppet like the Xuanqi Armor Warrior is of little use to the Phosphorus-Free Great Ancestor, and only the Infinite Realm Armor Warrior is of great use to the Phosphorus-Free Great Ancestor.

Once an Infinite Realm Armor is opened, its strength is comparable to the invincible fifth-stage combat power, who doesn't want it?

So, Ye Tian asked, "The Phosphorus-Free Great Ancestor should have an Infinite Realm Armor, right?"

"Yes!"

The Phosphorus-Free Ancestor admitted.

Ye Tian smiled and said: "I do have a lot of gold in my hands, but I don't need ordinary resources, I don't know what the phosphorus-free ancestor can come up with?"

"How much is it?"

The Phosphorus-Free Ancestor was curious.

"One hundred thousand!"

Ye Tian said a number.

The ruin gold he has is naturally far beyond this number, but 100,000 ruin gold is already a lot, if he can trade good things from the phosphorus-free Great Ancestor, then he is naturally willing to trade.

But if the Phosphorus-Free Great Ancestor couldn't take out the resources he needed, he wouldn't take them out.

"100,000 ruins of gold !!"

The Phosphorus-Free Ancestor was shocked.

He didn't expect that Ye Tian would have a fourth-stage high-level immeasurable lifeform that would have 100,000 ruin gold, he was very curious about where Ye Tian had found so much ruin gold!

Must trade!

This is what the phosphorus-free ancestor thinks now!

Subsequently, he said several resources, but Ye Tian was not interested.

"What do you want, tell me, if I have it, I'll give it to you!" The Phosphorus-Free Ancestor said helplessly, he really didn't know what Ye Tian wanted.

Ye Tian pondered for a while, and had an idea in his heart.

"Gilded Blood Fruit, do you have it?"

Ye Tian asked.

"Gilded Blood Fruit, do you want this treasure?"

The Phosphorus-Free Great Ancestor was shocked.

Although the gilded blood fruit is very precious, the usefulness of this treasure is not too great, and it does not match its value.

First of all, the gilded blood fruit can condense immeasurable blood, and it can easily condense immeasurable blood to 129,600 drops.

In other words, a Great Ancestor of the Immeasurable Blood Stage who had just broken through only needed to swallow a gilded blood fruit to break through to the peak realm of the Immeasurable Blood Stage in a short period of time.

However, it would be a waste to take the Gilded Blood Fruit like this!

The greatest use of the gilded blood fruit is to accelerate the transformation of the quality of immeasurable blood, for example, the immeasurable bones of the whole body like Ye Tian have reached the super-quality, and the immeasurable blood is about to enter the super-quality.

In this way, taking the gilded blood fruit can promote the transformation of the quality of immeasurable blood in a very short period of time, and achieve super quality.

But a Great Ancestor like Ye Tian is too rare, resulting in the Gilded Blood Fruit being useless, if it is used for the third stage Immeasurable Blood Ancestor, it will be too wasteful.

"If the Phosphorus-Free Great Ancestor doesn't have a gilded blood fruit, then I'll think about it again. "

However, as soon as Ye Tian finished speaking, the Phosphorus-Free Great Ancestor replied: "Endless Great Ancestor, although I don't have a gilded blood fruit, I know who has it, and I can get it soon." But if you really want to exchange the ruin gold for the gilded blood fruit, we will have to negotiate the price. "

"Good!"

Ye Tian was a little surprised, he didn't expect to be able to really trade the gilded blood fruit.

Subsequently, Ye Tian talked with the Phosphorus-Free Great Ancestor.

In the end, he was ready to trade 10,000 ruins of gold for a gilded blood fruit.

"I want to trade 90,000 ruins of gold for a recipe that impacts the resources of the Heavenly Ancestor, such as the Nine Dragons Liquid, can the Phosphorus-Free Great Ancestor have it?"

"Well, I naturally have it!" "The Phosphorus-Free Ancestor nodded, "But I don't have the formula of Nine Dragons Liquid, the formula I have is called Qinglong Liquid, the formula is not worth 90,000 ruins, what is really precious is the material." How about I give you the Aotaki liquid recipe and a token to enter the Cosmos Tower?"

"Okay, that's it!"

Ye Tian readily agreed.

Soon after, Ye Tian and the Phosphorus-Free Great Ancestor came to the King Kong River Realm one after another to trade here.

......

"Endless Ancestor!"

"Phosphorus-free Great Ancestor!"

After Ye Tian and the Phosphorus-free Great Ancestor met, they greeted each other.

Immediately, they began to officially trade.

Ye Tian took out 100,000 ruin gold, and the Phosphorus-Free Great Ancestor also took out a gilded blood fruit, a Qinglong liquid formula, and a Huanyu Tower token.

After exchanging the treasure, the transaction is completed.

Immediately, Ye Tian left quickly.

After Ye Tian left, the Phosphorus-Free Great Ancestor sighed with emotion: "I didn't expect this Endless Great Ancestor's aura to be so powerful, although he is still in the fourth stage, his strength is definitely no less than that of the high-level immeasurable lifeform of the fifth stage!"

Although Ye Tian tried his best to hide it, he guessed that Ye Tian's immeasurable bone might have reached the super-grade quality, and the immeasurable blood was about to reach the super-grade quality, so he needed the gilded blood fruit.

Once such a demon ancestor becomes a fifth-stage high-level immeasurable lifeform, his strength is no less than him in a short period of time.

Before, he had this guess that he would take out the Universal Tower Token, otherwise he would never have used the Universal Tower Token as a transaction.

"Let's go, with these ruins, I can make the Infinite Realm armor fight, and I can go to that place!"

With that, the Phosphorus-Free Great Ancestor quickly left.

Genki Territory.

Ye Tian came back, and immediately began to retreat and refine the gilded blood fruit.

With this gilded blood fruit, he made 100% of the immeasurable blood step into the super-quality.

Grunt!

Ye Tian swallowed it in one gulp, and then refined the energy of the gilded blood fruit.

With the passage of time, Ye Tian's immeasurable blood was rapidly transformed under the tempering of the gilded blood fruit.

Tens of thousands of realms had passed, and his immeasurable blood transformation had been completely completed.

Rumble!!!!

The immeasurable blood completely stepped into the super-quality, and his flesh and blood body also began to change, and the aura of the entire body began to skyrocket.
